math_recheck: Re-derived the MAXSAT SDP relaxation, the per-clause penalty values (single/two/three-literal SAT/UNSAT gaps confirmed numerically: -0.125/+0.375, -0.25/+0.4167, {-0.5625,-0.3125}/+0.4375), the forward CD update, the readout-to-dv gradient, the total-differential/projector step (||g_o||dv_o=-P_o dg_o), and the pseudoinverse lemma; independently verified the backward gradients vs finite differences AND unrolled autograd: dl/dV_I and dl/dS (paper formulas) match ground truth to machine precision (reldiff 0.0), and dl/dz_i=(dv_i/dz_i)^T(-(Phi s_i)) matches FD to ~1e-6. Found and fixed a SIGN error in reasoning.md's illustrative backward code (dS and dz_in were the negation of the correct value).
fixes: reasoning.md:323-325 illustrative backward dS sign error: code computed dS = U W + V Phi but the verified-correct gradient (and the prose formula -(sum u_o s_o^T)^T V -(S V^T)U) is -(U W + V Phi); negated it (dS -= ...), verified reldiff 0.0 vs finite-diff and unrolled autograd

reasoning.md:330-339 illustrative backward dz_in: missing leading minus AND missing the cos-term (e_1 component) of dv_i/dz_i; added the minus and the val1*sign*cos(pi z)*pi term so it implements the verified-correct -(dv_i/dz_i)^T(Phi s_i); confirmed the general formula matches FD to ~1e-6
